---
title: "snRNA-seq HER2 Analysis"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    code_folding: show
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    fig_width: 10
    fig_height: 8
---
```{r}
set.seed(42)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  cache = TRUE
)

library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

paths <- list(
  raw = here("data", "raw"),
  results = here("results")
)

walk(paths, ~dir.create(.x, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE))
```

```{r}
library(anndataR)


```
